headline: Assessing Adobe (ADBE) Valuation After A Stretch Of Weak Shareholder Returns

headline: Adobe Deal And AI Moves Reframe The Semrush Holdings Investment Story
summary: Adobe has agreed to acquire Semrush Holdings (NYSE:SEMR), a deal that positions the SEO and online visibility platform inside a larger marketing software suite. Semrush has launched an official ChatGPT app, giving users a new way to access its SEO and competitive research tools directly within the ChatGPT interface. The company has also announced "Spotlight 2026", a flagship marketing conference focused on AI, SEO, and content, scheduled for 2026. Semrush, best known for its SEO and online...
